subcodes.first_line: The Mother Book crieth out from the horizon of the prison-heaven and proclaimeth: O peoples of the earth! Fear ye the All-Merciful, and follow not [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ام الکتاب من افق سماء السجن ینادی و یقول یا ملا الارض اتقوا الرحمن و لاتتبعوا
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @proclamation to the people of the world, @prophecy and fulfillment, @Manifestation of God as tree of life; sadratu'l-muntaha, @suffering and imprisonment
